# cboxdk/laravel-telemetry

> Collector-free telemetry for Laravel: Prometheus metrics, OTLP traces,
> events and logs. No C extension, no protobuf, no sidecar. Metrics
> aggregate in Redis/APCu so they are correct under PHP's shared-nothing
> FPM model. Facade: Cbox\Telemetry\Facades\Telemetry.

Key facts: metric names are lowercase dot-namespaced OTel style; push and
pull instruments are distinct API shapes; telemetry never throws into the
app; Telemetry::fake() provides in-memory test assertions; packages
integrate via the TelemetryProvider contract guarded by class_exists.

## Getting started

- [Installation](docs/getting-started/installation.md): composer require, store choice (redis/apcu/array), exporter setup, scheduler
- [Quickstart](docs/getting-started/quickstart.md): counters, gauges, histograms, spans, events
- [API reference](docs/getting-started/api-reference.md): the whole facade on one page — read this first
- [Testing](docs/getting-started/testing.md): Telemetry::fake() and all assertions

## Core concepts

- [Architecture](docs/core-concepts/architecture.md): signal flow, push vs pull, export timing, failure policy
- [Metrics](docs/core-concepts/metrics.md): counters, gauges, histograms, the shared store, cardinality
- [Traces](docs/core-concepts/traces.md): spans, W3C context propagation, sampling, buffering
- [Events](docs/core-concepts/events.md): structured events vs span events vs metrics
- [Logs](docs/core-concepts/logs.md): the telemetry log channel, severity mapping, trace correlation
- [Naming](docs/core-concepts/naming.md): OTel semantic conventions, rules

## Cookbook

- [Multi-tenant SaaS](docs/cookbook/multi-tenant-saas.md): tenant labels, cardinality budget, fleet gauges
- [Queue monitoring](docs/cookbook/queue-monitoring.md): depth, in-flight, oldest-job age, alerts
- [External services](docs/cookbook/external-services.md): outbound API instrumentation, distributed traces

## Reference

- [Configuration](docs/configuration/reference.md): every config key
- [Providers](docs/extension-points/providers.md): publish telemetry from your package
- [Custom exporters](docs/extension-points/exporters.md): the Exporter contract
- [Runtime hooks](docs/extension-points/hooks.md): request naming/enrichment, cache classification, user resolution, redaction
- [Prometheus](docs/production/prometheus.md): scrape setup, security, cardinality
- [OTLP](docs/production/otlp.md): direct export, scheduling, latency budget
- [Grafana stack](docs/production/grafana-stack.md): recommended backend routing (Tempo/Mimir/Loki), correlation, query starters
- [Performance](docs/production/performance.md): per-operation cost, tuning
- [Security](docs/production/security.md): endpoint protection, data leakage

## Optional

- [ADRs](docs/adr/0001-runtime-model.md): why no collector, why own core, why Redis
- [Prior art](docs/research/prior-art.md): survey of the PHP telemetry ecosystem
